scripts.format: prettier --write src scripts .github DEVELOPMENT.md package.json tsconfig.json .prettierrc.json
scripts.format:check: prettier --check src scripts .github DEVELOPMENT.md package.json tsconfig.json .prettierrc.json
scripts.check: bun run format:check && bun run typecheck && bun run check:boundaries && bun run test && bun run build && bun run smoke
